about_page.title: Partners in Success.
about_page.body:
Masarat Technologies is a leading enterprise IT solutions provider based in Kuwait. 

We specialize in architecting the mission-critical pillars of digital transformation — from national cybersecurity to intelligent infrastructure.

solutions.page_sub: Five core capabilities. One accountable partner.
solutions.title: Integrated Solutions.
solutions.cta_sub: Talk to our solutions team about your specific requirements.
solutions.s1desc: Enabling organisations to redesign, automate, and scale their core operations.
solutions.s2desc: Building the data and AI foundation for intelligent decision-making.
solutions.s3desc: Protecting critical environments through enterprise-grade security frameworks.
solutions.s4desc: Designing and implementing integrated physical and smart environments.
solutions.s5desc: Specialized data center and critical environment lifecycle management.

insights_page.title: Insights.
insights_page.body: Strategic intelligence on cybersecurity, AI, and the future of enterprise technology in Kuwait.

career_page.hero_sub: Be part of the team architecting the digital future of Kuwait.
career_page.why_statement: We foster a culture of excellence, innovation, and local impact.
career_page.no_positions_desc: We are always looking for exceptional talent. Send us your CV for future opportunities.
career_page.v1d: We uphold the highest standards of professional trust.
career_page.v2d: Driving the next wave of intelligent systems.
career_page.v3d: Creating real value for Kuwait's digital landscape.
career_page.b1d: Comprehensive coverage for you and your family.
career_page.b2d: Access to global certifications and training.
career_page.b3d: Dynamic environment with hybrid work options.

contact_page.title: Advisory.
contact_page.body: Connect with our strategic consultants to architect your institution's digital future.

home.vision_text: To be the most trusted architect of digital intelligence and national infrastructure in Kuwait.
home.mission_text: To deliver mission-critical technology solutions with single-point accountability and proven execution excellence.
